content.json:
# Persistence & Privilege Escalation
**MITRE ATT&CK:** T1136 Create Account · T1098 Account Manipulation · T1543.003 Windows Service · T1547 Boot/Logon Autostart · T1078.004 Cloud Accounts

**Data source:** `SecurityEvent`, `Event` (Windows), `AuditLogs` (Entra directory changes).

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 4720 | project TimeGenerated, Computer, NewAccount=TargetAccount, CreatedBy=SubjectAccount
content.title: New local accounts created — T1136.001

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID in (4728,4732,4756) | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Group=TargetUserName, AddedMember=MemberName, By=SubjectAccount | take 200
content.title: Added to privileged group — T1098

content.query: Event | where EventID == 7045 | project TimeGenerated, Computer, RenderedDescription | take 200
content.title: New service installed — T1543.003

content.query: AuditLogs | where OperationName has 'Add member to role' | extend Actor=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), Target=tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName), Role=tostring(TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties[1].newValue) | project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Actor, Target, Role | take 200
content.title: Entra role assignments — T1098.003 / T1078.004
